resources.string:
All-in-one Xposed module to hide ADB/USB Debugging, Developer Options, Accessibility Services, and Debugger status from apps. Keeps ADB enabled while making apps think it's off.

Features:
• Hide USB Debugging (ADB) status
• Hide Developer Options
• Hide Accessibility Services
• Hide Debugger connection
• Spoof system properties

by KuyangID
Telegram: t.me/KuyangID
